name: Single rollout tray
notes: Full extension; standard depth base cabinets. Width confirmed at order time from series.

name: Double rollout tray (stacked)
notes: Two-tier stacked; fits 30"+ base. Width confirmed at order time.

name: Full-extension rollout shelf (heavy duty)
notes: 100 lb rating; full extension. Width confirmed at order time.

name: Pull-out cabinet shelf
notes: Single shelf; base or upper; full extension. Width confirmed at order time.

name: Pull-out trash — double 27qt (15" base)
notes: SKU: 4WCSC-1527DM-2; Double 27qt; 12"W x 22-1/8"D x 19-11/32"H; CAB B15; Blum Movento soft-close; bottom mount. Largest double for 15" base — use ACC-025 for single 35qt.

name: Pull-out trash — double 35qt (18" base)
notes: SKU: 4WCSC-1835DM-2; Double 35qt; 15"W x 22-1/32"D x 20-3/8"H; CAB B18; Blum Movento soft-close; bottom mount.

name: Pull-out trash — double 35qt (21" base)
notes: SKU: 4WCSC-2135DM-2; Double 35qt; 18"W x 22-1/32"D x 20-5/16"H; CAB B21; Blum Movento soft-close; bottom mount.

name: Pull-out trash — single 35qt (15" base)
notes: SKU: 4WCSC-1535DM-1; Single 35qt; 12"W x 21-21/32"D x 19-1/2"H; CAB B15; Blum Movento soft-close; bottom mount. Use when client wants larger single bin over double 27qt.

name: Lazy susan — full round (corner base)
notes: Corner base; full round; polymer or wire. Not handed — spins in place. Width = susan diameter.

name: Lazy susan — kidney / D-shape (blind corner base)
notes: Blind corner base; 2-shelf kidney shape. HANDED — must specify Left or Right. Width = susan diameter.

name: Lazy susan — pie cut (corner base)
notes: Corner base; pie-cut shelves. HANDED — must specify Left or Right. Width = susan diameter.

name: Blind corner optimizer — The Cloud (base)
notes: Base blind corner; cloud-shaped polymer shelves; 1 or 2 tier. Size = face frame opening width. HANDED — must specify Left or Right. Price range $74.99–$955.99 by tier/size.

name: Blind corner optimizer — Girasolo w/ soft-close (base)
notes: Base blind corner; pivot-slide system; 1 or 2 tier maple shelves. Size = face frame opening width. HANDED — must specify Left or Right. Price range $462.99–$858.99.

name: Blind corner half-moon shelf — polymer (base)
notes: Base blind corner; traditional kidney/half-moon pull-out polymer shelves. HANDED. WARNING — series code 6842 not verified on RAS site 2026-07-14; confirm before ordering.

name: Blind corner half-moon shelf — wire (base)
notes: Base blind corner; traditional kidney/half-moon pull-out wire shelves. HANDED. WARNING — series code 6881 not verified on RAS site 2026-07-14; confirm before ordering.

name: Blind corner half-moon — maple wood (base)
notes: Base blind corner; maple wood half-moon pull-out. HANDED. WARNING — series code 4WLS882 not verified on RAS site 2026-07-14; confirm before ordering.

name: Lazy susan — full circle polymer (corner wall)
notes: Corner WALL cabinet; full circle 2 or 3-shelf polymer. Not handed. Width = susan diameter. Sold per shelf — specify shelf count at order. Price range $79.99–$132.99.

name: Lazy susan — D-shape wood (corner wall)
notes: Corner WALL cabinet; 2-shelf D-shape wood. Not handed. Width = susan diameter. Price range $359.99–$380.99.

name: Door mount spice rack
notes: Mounts inside door; upper or base cabinets.

name: Door mount tray divider
notes: Cutting board and tray storage; base cabinet door mount.

name: Pull-out peg drawer organizer
notes: Peg system; deep drawer organization. SKU confirmed at order time by width/finish.

name: Knife block insert (in-drawer)
notes: In-drawer horizontal knife storage.

name: Utensil divider kit
notes: Expandable drawer dividers; multi-section. WARNING — series code 4FSDB not confirmed on RAS site 2026-07-14; verify before ordering.

name: Pantry pull-out frame
notes: For pantry/tall cabinets; multiple shelf tiers. Width confirmed at order time.
